testcase.name: test_full_rust_faster_than_partial[python_gae]

failure.message: AssertionError: full_rust (45001 SPS) should be faster than python_gae (45890 SPS) assert 45000.85145653345 >= 45890.12890333026

testcase.failure: test_ablation.py:199: in test_full_rust_faster_than_partial assert rust_result["sps_median"] >= partial_result["sps_median"], ( E AssertionError: full_rust (45001 SPS) should be faster than python_gae (45890 SPS) E assert 45000.85145653345 >= 45890.12890333026

testcase.name: test_full_rust_faster_than_partial[python_env]

failure.message: AssertionError: full_rust (46387 SPS) should be faster than python_env (161251 SPS) assert 46386.527975205805 >= 161251.3863446135

testcase.failure: test_ablation.py:199: in test_full_rust_faster_than_partial assert rust_result["sps_median"] >= partial_result["sps_median"], ( E AssertionError: full_rust (46387 SPS) should be faster than python_env (161251 SPS) E assert 46386.527975205805 >= 161251.3863446135

testcase.name: test_full_rust_faster_than_partial[all_python]

failure.message: AssertionError: full_rust (47793 SPS) should be faster than all_python (155027 SPS) assert 47792.959406467155 >= 155027.21151423609

testcase.failure: test_ablation.py:199: in test_full_rust_faster_than_partial assert rust_result["sps_median"] >= partial_result["sps_median"], ( E AssertionError: full_rust (47793 SPS) should be faster than all_python (155027 SPS) E assert 47792.959406467155 >= 155027.21151423609

testcase.name: test_single_component_replacement_slows_down

failure.message: AssertionError: Some component replacements did NOT slow down performance: python_gae (46945) >= full_rust (43540) python_env (160350) >= full_rust (43540) assert 2 == 0 + where 2 = len(['python_gae (46945) >= full_rust (43540)', 'python_env (160350) >= full_rust (43540)'])

testcase.failure: test_ablation.py:242: in test_single_component_replacement_slows_down assert len(failures) == 0, ( E AssertionError: Some component replacements did NOT slow down performance: E python_gae (46945) >= full_rust (43540) E python_env (160350) >= full_rust (43540) E assert 2 == 0 E + where 2 = len(['python_gae (46945) >= full_rust (43540)', 'python_env (160350) >= full_rust (43540)'])

testcase.name: test_ablation_ranking_is_consistent

failure.message: AssertionError: full_rust (47569 SPS) should be faster than all_python (153725 SPS) assert 47568.86954567459 >= 153724.52616917365

testcase.failure: test_ablation.py:275: in test_ablation_ranking_is_consistent assert full_sps >= ap_sps, ( E AssertionError: full_rust (47569 SPS) should be faster than all_python (153725 SPS) E assert 47568.86954567459 >= 153724.52616917365
